content.rendered:
From spectacular festivals to intimate theatre shows, we love it all.

Our portfolio consists out of different kind of projects we would like to highlight. Here you’ll see some work we would like to tell you more about. Check it out and find out more about our designs for artists like Guus Meeuwis, Armin van Buuren, Hardwell and Steve Angello.

Events like New Horizons and Comedy & Concerts or lightdesigns for Clubs like Output (NY) or LaRoc (Brazil). But also, Corporate events like Liberty Global, Philips and Google. What are you waiting for?

Want to stay updated on all our projects? Make sure you follow us on social media.

  • Artists
  • Festival & Events
  • Specials
  • Corporate
